name: Oatmeal Blueberry Muffins
recipeInstructions:
1. Soak oats in milk until moisture is absorbed.
2. Add salad oil, egg, brown sugar and blueberries to the oats and mix thoroughly.
3. Mix together flour, baking soda, cinnamon, ground cloves, baking powder, salt, allspice, and nutmeg.
4. Combine the dry ingredients with the oat mixture and stir until well mixed.
5. Fill greased muffin cups 2/3 full with the batter.
6. Bake in a preheated oven at 400°F for 20 to 25 minutes, or until golden brown.
7. Serve hot.
